summary: Corpus expansion Tier 1 ‚Äî source the floating cohesion-critical concepts (Plato, Dionysius, Iamblichus, Heart Sutra, Dhammapada)
description:
## Goal

Source four taxonomy concepts that are **defined-but-floating** in the corpus today (no primary source backing them):

| Floating concept | Source that fixes it | Child |
|---|---|---|
| `demiurge`, `numerical_mysticism` | Plato ‚Äî Timaeus | 1 |
| `anamnesis`, `body_as_obstacle`, `soul_migration` | Plato ‚Äî Phaedo | 2 |
| `divine_madness`, `ladder_of_love`, `spiritual_ascent` | Plato ‚Äî Phaedrus | 3 |
| (cross-tradition illusion/awakening node) | Plato ‚Äî Republic VI‚ÄìVII (Cave + Good) | 4 |
| `apophatic_theology` | Pseudo-Dionysius ‚Äî Mystical Theology + Divine Names | 5 |
| `theurgy`, `cosmic_sympathy` | Iamblichus ‚Äî On the Mysteries | 6 |
| `sunyata_emptiness` | Heart Sutra | 7 |
| (broad ethical-psychological backbone) | Dhammapada | 8 |

## Net corpus effect

- platonism: 1 ‚Üí 5 sources
- christian_mysticism: gains its apophatic urtext (upstream of Eckhart already held)
- neoplatonism: gains its theurgy primary (the pro-theurgy answer to anti-theurgy Plotinus already held)
- buddhism: 1 ‚Üí 3 sources (Diamond Sutra + Heart Sutra + Dhammapada)

## Sequence

The 4 Plato children share the Jowett translation pattern ‚Üí do them as a block. Then Dionysius + Iamblichus (apophatic + theurgy bridge). Then Heart Sutra + Dhammapada (Buddhism rescue). All children are pipeline-tolerant ‚Äî no shared file conflicts, can run in parallel.

## Out of scope

- **Pistis Sophia** ‚Äî added to `docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` ¬ß4.12 on 2026-06-03; user is reviewing; do NOT include here.
- **Tier 2 sources** (Masnavi II‚ÄìVI, Attar, Shabistari, Gilgamesh, Adapa, Platform Sutra, Cloud of Unknowing, Theologia Germanica, Porphyry, Proclus, SBE11 Suttas) ‚Äî separate ticket later.
- **Upanishads bulk acquire** ‚Äî separate ticket, paused per `[[project_upanishads_bulk_deferred]]` memory.

## References

- `docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` ¬ß3 (full per-source detail)
- `sources/manifest.toml` (append target)
- `chunking/{platonism,christian_mysticism,neoplatonism,buddhism}/` (config target)
